## The problem

<!--
What is the user-visible problem this feature would solve? Who
hits it, and how often? Concrete scenarios beat abstract wishes.
-->

## Proposed solution

<!--
What you want to see. UI sketch, route name, config flag — whatever
form is most concrete. It is fine to suggest more than one option.
-->

## Alternatives considered

<!-- Other ways to address the same problem, and why you preferred the above. -->

## Fit with the project

<!--
Curatables is a self-hosted, single-family appliance. Features
that fit best:
  - keep the parent in control of what is approved,
  - keep the kid UI working on Safari iOS 9 and other old browsers,
  - do not require a cloud account or paid service,
  - do not introduce ads, recommendations, or engagement loops.

If your idea cuts against any of these, say so up front and
explain why it is still worth it.
-->
